name: Mexican Cheese Squares
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Can green chile peppers or diced
Fresh jalapeno peppers, deveined and seeded
2 cups Packed, grated Cheddar cheese (1/2 lb.)
1 tbsp Fresh cilantro leaves, torn (no stems)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, whisk together eggs, flour, salt and baking powder until smooth.
2. Stir in diced chile peppers, sour cream and cheese.
3. Add hot sauce to taste and cilantro.
4. Melt butter in an 8-inch square baking dish.
5. Pour mixture into dish and spread with a spatula.
6. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
7. Turn heat down to 350°F and bake an additional 30 minutes, or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.
8. Cool slightly, then cut into squares to serve.
Yield: About 24 squares.
